title: 🔍 WhatsApp Forensics: Recovering Deleted Messages Understanding how WhatsApp stores data is fundamental to any digital forensic investigation. At its core, WhatsApp messages are stored in SQLite databases: Android: msgstore.db iOS: ChatStorage.sqlit - LinkedIn

🔍 WhatsApp Forensics: Recovering Deleted Messages Understanding how WhatsApp stores data is fundamental to any digital forensic investigation. At its core, WhatsApp messages are stored in SQLite databases: Android: msgstore.db iOS: ChatStorage.sqlit &nbsp;&nbsp; LinkedIn
